cards.title: 02 Compare economics
cards.body: Direct demand should be reviewed by net value, not only gross booking value. Include channel cost, payment cost, source attribution, cancellation behavior, and repeat relationship value.

cards.title: 03 Match the booking path
cards.body: A direct path works better when it sends the guest to the right room, package, dining, spa, event, experience, or inquiry route instead of a generic homepage.

items.question: What is direct hotel distribution?
items.answer: It is the way hotels create and convert demand through channels they can control or measure directly.

items.question: Does direct mean no OTAs?
items.answer: No. Direct distribution means the hotel builds a stronger owned and measurable demand mix while OTAs can still play a role.

items.question: Where should I go next?
items.answer: Read the direct hotel distribution resource, then request a demo if you want to map the flow around your hotel.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
